properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord of all creation Of the water, earth and sky The Heavens are Your Tabernacle Glory to the Lord on high

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God of wonders, beyond our galaxy You are holy, holy The universe declares Your majesty You are holy, holy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord of Heaven and Earth Lord of Heaven and Earth

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Early in the morning I will celebrate the light And when I stumble into darkness I will call Your name by night

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah to the Lord of Heaven and earth Hallelujah to the Lord of Heaven and earth Hallelujah to the Lord of Heaven and earth
